allow: Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; data=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(f['name']\) for f in data]")
Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; data=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(f['name']\) for f in data if 'name' in f]")
Bash(python3 -c " import json,sys try: data=json.load\(sys.stdin\) if isinstance\(data, list\): [print\(f['name']\) for f in data if 'name' in f] else: print\(data\) ")
Bash(ssh -o ConnectTimeout=10 -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no root@cdpi-vps "echo connected && pwd")
Bash(ssh -o ConnectTimeout=10 root@cdpi-vps "find /root -name 'api-test*.sh' 2>/dev/null; echo '---'; ls /root/cdpi-poc/ 2>/dev/null || ls /root/ 2>/dev/null | head -30")

Bash(ssh -o ConnectTimeout=10 root@cdpi-vps "curl -s 'https://api.github.com/repos/credebl/platform/pulls?state=all&per_page=10&page=1' | python3 -c \\"import sys,json; prs=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(p['number'], p['state'], p.get\('merged_at',''\), p['title'][:80]\) for p in prs]\\" 2>&1")

Bash(ssh -o ConnectTimeout=10 root@cdpi-vps "curl -s 'https://api.github.com/repos/credebl/platform/issues/1279' | python3 -c \\"import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('Type:', 'PR' if 'pull_request' in d else 'Issue'\); print\('Title:', d.get\('title'\)\); print\('State:', d.get\('state'\)\); print\('ClosedAt:', d.get\('closed_at'\)\)\\"")

Bash(ssh -o ConnectTimeout=10 root@cdpi-vps "curl -s 'https://api.github.com/repos/credebl/platform/pulls?state=all&per_page=100&page=1' | python3 -c \\"import sys,json; prs=json.load\(sys.stdin\); matches=[p for p in prs if 'sdjwt' in p['title'].lower\(\) or 'sd-jwt' in p['title'].lower\(\) or 'sd_jwt' in p['title'].lower\(\) or 'sdjwt' in p.get\('head',{}\).get\('ref',''\).lower\(\)]; [print\(p['number'], p['state'], p.get\('merged_at',''\), p['title'][:80]\) for p in matches]\\"")

Bash(ssh -o ConnectTimeout=10 root@cdpi-vps "docker exec credebl-issuance grep -r 'sdjwt\\|sd_jwt\\|SD_JWT\\|credentialType' /app/dist/apps/issuance/main.js 2>/dev/null | grep -i 'sdjwt\\|invalid credential' | head -20")

Bash(ssh -o ConnectTimeout=10 root@cdpi-vps "docker inspect credebl-issuance --format '{{.Config.Image}}'; docker inspect credebl-issuance --format '{{index .Config.Labels \\"org.opencontainers.image.version\\"}}'; docker inspect credebl-issuance --format '{{.Config.Labels}}'")

Bash(ssh -o ConnectTimeout=10 root@cdpi-vps "docker exec credebl-issuance cat /app/package.json 2>/dev/null | python3 -c \\"import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('version:', d.get\('version'\)\); print\('name:', d.get\('name'\)\)\\" 2>/dev/null; echo '---'; docker exec credebl-issuance node -e \\"const fs=require\('fs'\); const b=fs.readFileSync\('/app/dist/apps/issuance/main.js','utf8'\); const i=b.indexOf\('invalid credential type'\); console.log\(i>-1 ? b.substring\(Math.max\(0,i-200\), i+200\) : 'NOT FOUND'\)\\" 2>/dev/null")
Bash(ssh -o ConnectTimeout=10 root@cdpi-vps 'docker exec credebl-issuance node -e " *)
Bash(ssh -o ConnectTimeout=10 root@cdpi-vps 'docker exec credebl-api-gateway node -e " *)

Bash(ssh -o ConnectTimeout=10 root@cdpi-vps "curl -s 'https://api.github.com/repos/credebl/platform/releases?per_page=5' | python3 -c \\"import sys,json; releases=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(r['tag_name'], r['published_at'], r['name'][:60]\) for r in releases]\\"")
Bash(ssh -o ConnectTimeout=10 root@cdpi-vps "docker pull ghcr.io/credebl/api-gateway:latest 2>&1 | tail -5")
Bash(ssh -o ConnectTimeout=10 root@cdpi-vps "docker pull ghcr.io/credebl/issuance:latest 2>&1 | tail -5")
